name: Eucalyptus
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system to be coded from the Eucalyptus light and dark design-system boards: silver-green leaves, blue-grey undertones, bark-tan warmth, clean healthcare surfaces, and calm accessible contrast. The light and dark boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for clean product UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual healthcare labels, clear forms, and calm numeric hierarchy.
layout: Precise 8px healthcare grids, rounded clinical panels, leaf-stem dividers, soft bark texture, and measured dashboard density.
